working_on: Phase 2 machinery hardening (Tier 1 of approved adversarial-analysis plan): A1 migrate pre-commit hook from worktree-specific path to tracked tools/hooks/pre-commit; A3 add Recovery sections to session-build-lifecycle.md and session-shutdown-sequence.md (interrupted-shutdown + eager-claim race); A4 fix docs/content-strategy.md:102 authoring-future-tense residual ADR 0036 violation; C1 add scope-clarification sentence to CLAUDE.md end-state-quality rule; C3 add First-session reading order subsection to CLAUDE.md; Tier 3 add CLAUDE.md note naming pushback / two-layer recording / startup-ceremony-order as posture-without-enforcement; C2 log outward-facing-voice-contract gap to docs/tensions.md (decide-before Phase 7). ROADMAP.md cleanup (originally S-0019 plan) shifts to S-0021; Tier 2 (A2 wrapper, B4 validator, C4 STATE.md framing) lands at S-0020.
outcome_summary: Pre-Phase-2 machinery hardening (Tier 1 of approved adversarial-analysis plan) landed bundled in one session per user direction. A1: pre-commit hook symlink retargeted from worktree-specific path to relative `../../tools/hooks/pre-commit`; resolves stably across worktree churn. A3: Recovery sections added to session-build-lifecycle.md (eager-claim race + symlink restore) and session-shutdown-sequence.md (four-state interrupted-shutdown taxonomy with split-state escalation route). A4: docs/content-strategy.md:102 authoring-future tense rewritten to present-state declarative — the one residual ADR 0036 violation post-S-0018 cleared. C1: CLAUDE.md end-state-quality rule gained scope clarification (newly-authored content; sweeps that retrofit existing content to a newly-imposed contract are exempt and belong in the new contract's Consequences) — closes the latent contradiction with ADR 0036's deferred-cleanup schedule. C3: new `## First-session reading order` section in CLAUDE.md names the four-doc cold-start priority. Tier 3: new `### Posture vs machinery` subsection in CLAUDE.md names pushback rule, two-layer decision recording, and startup ceremony order as discipline-level postures with no validator/hook enforcement. C2 log: OQ-OUTWARD-VOICE added to docs/tensions.md for the third expression-contract gap (UI / help / public README / App Store), decide-before Phase 7. Five commits this session: eager-claim, A1+A3, A4, CLAUDE.md cluster, C2 log + final shutdown. tools/validate.py: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns. STATE.md updated with S-0020 next-session work item (Tier 2 dedicated session: A2 MemPalace capture wrapper, B4 ADR-index/file consistency validator extension, C4 STATE.md backup-tag framing softening); ROADMAP.md substantive cleanup shifts to S-0021; Phase 2 opens at S-0022. Plan file at ~/.claude/plans/then-expression-contract-for-nifty-pie.md.
